nasb.text: Only acknowledge your iniquity, That you have transgressed against the Lord your God And have scattered your favors to the strangers under every green tree, And you have not obeyed My voice,’ declares the Lord.

esv.text: Only acknowledge your guilt, that you rebelled against the Lord your God and scattered your favors among foreigners under every green tree, and that you have not obeyed my voice, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: ‘只要你承認自己的罪孽， 就是悖逆了耶和華你的　神， 在每棵繁茂的樹下，濫愛外族人的神， 沒有聽從我的話。’ 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: ‘你必须要承认自己的罪， 承认背叛了你的上帝耶和华， 在绿荫树下祭拜各种外邦的神明， 不听从我的话。’ 这是耶和华说的。
